entry.title: How to Rebuild Your Gut Microbiome After Antibiotics: A Complete Science-Based Recovery Guide

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: WYGB Matters

Abstract: ... Sauerkraut and kimchi — These lacto-fermented vegetables deliver Lactobacillus species along with prebiotic fiber from the vegetables themselves. Make sure to choose refrigerated, unpasteurized versions — shelf-stable products have been heat-treated ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: Bacterial Chemotaxis as a Test Case for Cause-Class Evaluation in Origin - of - Life Science

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: C Mason

Journal: 2026

Abstract: ... is central to both evolutionary biology and origin - of - life science. Standard accounts attribute such systems to cumulative natural selection acting on random variation within already-living populations, or, in the case of prebiotic systems, to ...

entry.title: Prebiotic Potential of Turmeric and Fingerroot Polysaccharides: Modulation of Human Gut Microbiota and Metabolite Profiles in In Vitro Colonic Fermentation

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: O La-ongkham, J Klinsoda, M Nakphaichit... - Applied Food Research, 2026

Abstract: The prebiotic potential of crude polysaccharide extracts from turmeric (Curcuma longa; CP-TM) and fingerroot (Boesenbergia rotunda; CP-FR) was investigated using galactooligosaccharides (GOS) as a reference. Extracts were characterized for ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life
